top_signals.title: How the War with Iran is Shaping Key U.S. Relations Beyond the Middle East
top_signals.summary:
The U.S. war with Iran has had political, economic, and military implications that spread far beyond the Middle East. We asked five experts to assess how the war with Iran has affected U.S. bilateral relations with key countries that illustrate some of the global ramifications: South Korea, India, Ukraine, France, and the United Kingdom.Read more below.  Jenny Town Senior Fellow at the Stimson Center and the Director of 38 NorthSouth Korea has resisted aiding U.S. military operations to forcefully reopen the Strait of Hormuz, pledging other forms of political and logistical support instead. This has, at times, drawn harsh criticism from President Donald Trump. It has also

The post How the War with Iran is Shaping Key U.S. Relations Beyond the Middle East appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Unfazed by Iran’s threats, Bulgaria moves to aid U.S. military operations
top_signals.summary: A Bulgarian parliamentary committee has approved a U.S. request to let American forces use a local air base to support the U.S. war against Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cost of Iran war rises to $37.5 billion, Pentagon requests $67.1 billion more
top_signals.summary: The Iran war has cost the DoD $37.5 billion to date, Hegseth told senators Tuesday, as he requested $67.1 billion more in emergency funding.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BOJ Is Said Open to Faster Rate Hike Pace as Yen Adds Risks - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: BOJ Is Said Open to Faster Rate Hike Pace as Yen Adds Risks  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China Bond Rally Shows Weak Economic Sentiment Before Politburo
top_signals.summary: China’s sovereign bonds are rallying once again as economic weakness, sliding stocks and expectations for greater monetary policy support revive demand for fixed-income assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Curbs Loan Structure Widely Used by Distressed Developers
top_signals.summary: China is restricting real estate companies from using a popular offshore loan structure that has helped some of them weather the country’s property crisis, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to recent moves to strengthen oversight of overseas borrowing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kraken parent Payward partners with GTN to scale xStocks internationally, beyond US equities
top_signals.summary: xStocks is tokenizing equities from Hong Kong before expanding to the UK, Europe, South Korea, and other international markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong, Malaysia Collaborate to Broaden Cross-Market Access
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong and Malaysia will work together to expand access to capital and deepen cross-border participation in both markets as they look to attract more international investment.

top_signals.title: European Commission Appoints Aliénor Margerit as Head of Representation in Paris
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 22 Jul 2026 Today, Aliénor Margerit has been appointed as the new Head of the European Commission Representation in Paris, France.

top_signals.title: European Commission transfers in the Interest of the Service Zacharias Giakoumis as Head of Representation in Athens
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 22 Jul 2026 Today, Commission decided to transfer in the interest of the service Zacharias Giakoumis as new Head of Representation in Athens, Greece.
